original_statement: how many drivers scored at leasst 4 points?
mutated_statement: how many people did something at leasst 4 something?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action obfuscation + Metric obfuscation: role "drivers" generalized to "people" | action "scored" replaced by vague "did something" | metric "points" replaced by "something" (drivers → people | scored → did something | points → something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的内容识别：agent直接写出解释“最合理的解释是统计得分至少4分的drivers……因此有3名司机”，并在simple_query的thought中列举了Alain Prost(9)、Nelson Piquet(6)、Stefan Johansson(4)。整个日志未出现对问题模糊性的提示、澄清请求或不确定性表述。agent未提及变异问题中的泛化与模糊（如将drivers泛化为people或将scored/points模糊化），而是按自己理解直接执行并给出具体答案。因此符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的定义：没有识别或表述不明确性，直接按自认为明确的目标完成任务。
